user_system_path: Create the landing-page contract and convert the screenshot-based public landing page into a code-native React/Tailwind implementation while preserving the dark premium visual direction and public funnel route contract.
allowed_files_raw: Landing contract, public landing page implementation, landing assets only if still necessary for mockup detail, and focused landing/public-route tests.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard, auth rewrite, Slack backend, Supabase/schema, Stripe/billing, fake integrations, unsupported product claims, #99 implementation, or generic SaaS template work.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity; npm run lint; npm run build; landing route proof; /start proof; CTA click proof; desktop/mobile screenshots; no horizontal overflow; grep proof for forbidden claims
required_browser_proof: Landing page loads at /, /start loads, header/hero/final CTAs route safely, desktop and mobile screenshots captured, no horizontal overflow.
acceptance_condition: docs/LANDING_PAGE_CONTRACT.md exists, public landing page is code-native or narrow PR is open, routes work, screenshots are captured, build passes, no backend touched, and no unsupported claims introduced.
stop_condition: Stop once one issue #121 PR is opened with landing contract, code-native LP repair, proof, source-truth closeout, and GitHub receipt.
anti_regression_checks: landing page uses real HTML text for primary copy
next_command: Run issue #121 landing page frontend contract + code-native LP repair and stop.
